items.summary: With PowerShell + DevOps Global Summit 2026 opening this Monday, April 13th, this episode brings back one of the most respected names in the PowerShell community: Jeff Hicks. items.title: Intune Stack and the Art of Showing Up with Hailey Phillips
items.summary: IntuneStack in action: Hailey's CI/CD-influenced PowerShell project manages Intune policy deployment across dev, test, and prod groups using promotion gates rather than expensive separate tenants — a more resilient, consistent, and auditable approach to endpoint management. items.title: Poking Around Until Something Breaks (And Then Reporting It to Microsoft) with Morten Mynster
items.summary: Publishing your work publicly, even to a small audience, creates opportunities that a resume never could. items.title: From School IT Intern to Systems Architect with Chris Thomas
items.summary: K-12 IT veteran Chris Thomas joins The PowerShell Podcast to share his 26-year journey in educational technology, from a high school IT internship to becoming an Endpoint Cloud Systems Architect supporting multiple school districts in Michigan.
